summary: Phase 1 Optimization Testing Complete - All 22 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. Fixed MongoDB OverflowError in /api/signals endpoint by enhancing convert_numpy_types() to handle large integers. Weekend handling verified - tick_index/cvd/ofi fallback to simulated data as expected.
passed_tests: ✅ P0: /api/analyze returns all 17 required keys (symbol, analysis, mtf_confluence, real_vix, real_vxn, real_gamma, term_structure, treasury, tick_index, cvd, ofi, vwap, session_vwaps, volume_profile, session_vps, economic_calendar, timestamp)
✅ P0: real_vix.source = yahoo_finance
✅ P0: real_vxn.source = yahoo_finance
✅ P0: real_gamma.source contains 'yahoo' or 'estimated'
✅ P0: term_structure.source = yahoo_finance
✅ P0: treasury.source = yahoo_finance
✅ P0: /api/analyze warm cache response time < 3s (actual: ~1-2s)
✅ P0: /api/market-data returns data with count > 0 (462 candles for MNQ)
✅ P0: OHLCV cache working (second call faster)
✅ All 4 symbols work: MNQ, MES, MYM, M2K via /api/market-data
✅ All 4 symbols work: MNQ, MES, MYM, M2K via /api/analyze
✅ P1: /api/autotrading/config toggle paper_trading=true - no OverflowError
✅ P1: /api/autotrading/evaluate works without errors
✅ P1: /api/autotrading/paper-orders endpoint works
✅ P2: Weekend handling - /api/analyze returns gracefully with simulated tick_index/cvd/ofi
✅ /api/signals/MNQ now works (OverflowError FIXED)
✅ Frontend: Chart loads with 462 candles
✅ Frontend: Market Regime panel shows TRANSICAO (6/13)
✅ Frontend: MTF Confluence shows LONG with Strength: STRONG
✅ Frontend: VIX (REAL) shows 23.87 with source: yahoo_finance
✅ Frontend: VXN (REAL) shows 27.04 with source: yahoo_finance
✅ Frontend: All indicators visible (RSI, MACD, EMA CROSS, BOLLINGER, STOCHASTIC, ADX, ATR)
✅ Frontend: Volume Profile levels on chart (VAH, POC, VAL)
✅ Frontend: VWAP levels on chart
critical_code_review_comments: OBV indicator values are being clamped to max 8-byte int (9223372036854775807) - this is a workaround, not a fix. The OBV calculation may need review to prevent overflow in the first place.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (enhanced convert_numpy_types function to handle large integers and datetime objects)
test_credentials: No auth needed - public API endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 optimization fully tested. Key findings: 1) /api/analyze returns all 17 required keys with correct sources (yahoo_finance for VIX, VXN, term_structure, treasury). 2) Warm cache response time ~1-2s. 3) OHLCV cache working (15min TTL). 4) Weekend handling works - tick_index/cvd/ofi fallback to simulated data. 5) MongoDB OverflowError FIXED by enhancing convert_numpy_types() to clamp large integers to 8-byte max. 6) All 4 symbols (MNQ, MES, MYM, M2K) work. 7) Frontend displays chart with candles, Market Regime (TRANSICAO 6/13), MTF Confluence (LONG), VIX/VXN panels with yahoo_finance source.

bug_fix_applied.issue: MongoDB OverflowError: MongoDB can only handle up to 8-byte ints
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: OBV (On-Balance Volume) indicator was producing very large integers that exceeded MongoDB's 8-byte int limit
bug_fix_applied.fix: Enhanced convert_numpy_types() function to: 1) Clamp integers to MongoDB's 8-byte range (-9223372036854775808 to 9223372036854775807), 2) Handle datetime objects, 3) Handle tuples, 4) Recursively process numpy arrays
bug_fix_applied.verification: /api/signals/MNQ now returns 200 OK instead of 500 Internal Server Error

mocked_api_note: No APIs mocked. DataBento trades return simulated/empty on weekends (expected behavior). yfinance macro data (VIX, VXN, Gamma, Treasury, Term Structure) is real yahoo_finance source.
